settings.title: Biomsify® Fermentation
settings.text: Beneficial microbes are cultivated using a proprietary fermentation approach designed to mimic aspects of the gut environment.

settings.title: TriBIOM® Ecosystem Design
settings.text: Each Biom formula combines beneficial microbes, microbial nutrients, and postbiotic metabolites — a complete system, not just a capsule.

settings.title: Microbiome Systems Approach
settings.text: Instead of delivering isolated bacteria, Biom formulations are designed to support the full microbial ecosystem in your gut.

settings.heading: Feed. Seed. Sustain. The Three-Part Architecture

settings.title: Peer-Reviewed Research
settings.text: Our team publishes microbiome research in scientific journals and translates it into product design.

settings.text: Biomsify® and TriBIOM® technologies are protected by granted and pending patents.

settings.text: Formulas are built on ingredients validated in independent clinical studies.

settings.heading: Microbiome Research Turned Into Real Products
settings.text: Founded by scientists, Biom turns peer-reviewed microbiome research into systems that support real health outcomes.

settings.question: What makes BIOM different from standard probiotic supplements?
settings.answer: BIOM uses a three-part systems approach — prebiotics, probiotics, and postbiotics — combined with proprietary Biofully™ fermentation. This creates a complete ecosystem architecture rather than simply adding bacterial CFUs.

settings.question: How does Biofully™ fermentation improve bioavailability?
settings.answer: Biofully™ cultures bacteria under gut-mimicked conditions, producing strains pre-adapted to the human colonic pH and oxygen levels.

settings.question: How are BIOM formulas different for women vs. general gut health?
settings.answer: Women's formulas like VFlora Daily are specifically designed around the gut-vaginal axis, while general formulas target core gut microflora.

settings.question: How long does it take to see results from a microbiome systems approach?
settings.answer: Microbiome shifts are gradual — most people notice initial digestive changes within 2–4 weeks. Meaningful ecosystem-level changes supporting metabolism, immunity, or energy typically emerge over 8–12 weeks of consistent use.

settings.question: Why do BIOM products include postbiotics?
settings.answer: Postbiotics — the metabolites bacteria produce — are increasingly recognized as key mediators of gut-body communication, including short-chain fatty acids that nourish the gut lining.

settings.question: Are BIOM products safe for daily long-term use?
settings.answer: Yes. All BIOM formulas use GRAS-affirmed or clinically documented strains and food-grade fermentation, and are designed for continuous daily use.
